top_signals.title: How startups are reshaping the Pentagon’s drone industry
top_signals.summary: Experts say the Drone Dominance competition reflects a broader shift in how the Pentagon acquires military technology and cultivates defense startups.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The DEF Act is half relief bill, half noise
top_signals.summary:
Congress is fast-tracking a bipartisan DEF relief bill. The half in the press release stops trucks from derating to 5 mph over a false sensor code. The half you have to read the text to find suspends the 2027 emissions rule for 10 years

The post The DEF Act is half relief bill, half noise appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Arcus rolls out 24/7 tokenized US stocks and perpetual markets on Robinhood Chain
top_signals.summary: Arcus rolled out 24/7 trading for over 95 Stock Tokens on Robinhood Chain and also introduced beta perpetual markets with USDG collateral.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Tokyo-area condo prices hit record high in first half of 2026
top_signals.summary: The average price of new condominiums in the Tokyo metropolitan area rose 13.1% from a year before to ¥101.35 million.
